parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Define and document the types of accounts allowed and prohibited; assign account managers; require approvals for requests to create accounts; and monitor the use of accounts.

parts.name: guidance
parts.prose: Account management includes the identification of account types, establishment of conditions for group membership, and assignment of associated authorizations.

controls.title: Account Management | Automated System Account Management

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Support the management of system accounts using automated mechanisms.

parts.name: statement
parts.prose: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging in support of the audit function; and coordinate the event logging function with other organizational entities.

parts.name: guidance
parts.prose: An event is an observable occurrence in a system. The types of events that require logging are those events significant to the security of systems.
